name: GH_Component.GH_OutputParamManager
summary: This class is used during Component construction to add output parameters.

methods.name: AddArcParameter
methods.signature: public int AddArcParameter(string name, string nickname, string description, GH_ParamAccess access)
methods.summary: Add a 3D Arc parameter to the output list of this component.

params.name: name
params.doc: The name of the parameter. Keep it short, single words are best.

params.name: nickname
params.doc: The nickname of the parameter. Keep it short, single characters are best.

params.name: description
params.doc: The description of the parameter. Be succinct but clear, single sentences are best.

params.name: access
params.doc: Parameter access type. You must provide a correct access code in order to use SetData(), SetDataList() or SetDataTree() respectively.

methods.name: AddParameter(IGH_Param)
methods.signature: public int AddParameter(IGH_Param param)
methods.summary: Generic parameter addition. If you cannot use one of the utility methods provided by this class, you can register a customized parameter using this method.

params.name: param
params.doc: The parameter to add.

returns.doc: Index of the newly added parameter.

params.name: param

params.name: name
params.doc: The name of the parameter. Keep it short, single words are best.

params.name: nickname
params.doc: The nickname of the parameter. Keep it short, single characters are best.

params.doc: The description of the parameter. Be succinct but clear, single sentences are best.

params.name: access
params.doc: Parameter access type. You must provide a correct access code in order to use SetData(), SetDataList() or SetDataTree() respectively.

methods.name: HideParameter
methods.signature: public override void HideParameter(int index)
methods.summary: Hide a specific output parameter. If the parameter at the given index implement IGH_PreviewObject then the Hidden flag will be set to True. Otherwise, nothing will happen.

params.name: index
params.doc: Index of parameter to hide.
